tweets.text:
Every American needs to see this.

18-year-old Sheridan Gorman was brutally murdered in Chicago — just blocks from her college dorm — by an illegal alien who should never have been here.

At 1:30 a.m., while watching the northern lights near Lake Michigan, a masked gunman opened fire. Sheridan warned her friends and ran — only making it about 40 feet before she was shot in the back and killed in cold blood.

Her devastated parents are calling it what it is: "It was a preventable murder."

The killer was released into the U.S. under Biden, arrested for shoplifting in sanctuary Chicago, released without notifying ICE, and then skipped court.

Her father demands accountability: "When someone commits a crime and they've been here illegally, there needs to be cooperation... He should've been handed over to the feds."

Open borders and sanctuary policies killed Sheridan Gorman.

This is the human cost of failed leadership.
